Destinations

Choose a destination only after the region and country fit makes sense

Each destination guide is built to answer the planning questions that matter before booking: what the place is really like, how to get there, what to do, where to stay, where to eat, and when it is worth the detour.

Destination Directory

Launch focus: East Africa first, then the rest of the continent

The strongest launch flow begins with Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and Rwanda, then expands into Southern Africa, North Africa, and West Africa so travelers can compare classic safari icons with cities, coastlines, desert routes, and cultural journeys.

Reset
17 destinations found
East Africa Midrange

Kenya

Maasai Mara

One of Kenya’s most iconic safari landscapes, the Maasai Mara is best known for sweeping savannah, excellent predator sightings, and seasonal migration drama.

Wildlife Photography Family
Open guide Tours in Kenya Stays in Kenya
East Africa Midrange

Uganda

Murchison Falls National Park

Murchison is Uganda’s flagship savannah safari, mixing game drives, Nile boat cruises, birding, and waterfall drama in one easy circuit.

Wildlife Adventure Family
Open guide Tours in Uganda Stays in Uganda
East Africa Luxury

Uganda

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park

Bwindi is one of Africa’s most powerful wildlife experiences, ideal for travelers prioritizing gorilla trekking and forest-based adventure.

Wildlife Conservation Adventure
Open guide Tours in Uganda Stays in Uganda
East Africa Midrange

Kenya

Amboseli National Park

Amboseli is especially rewarding for first-time safari travelers who want reliable elephant sightings and postcard mountain backdrops.

Wildlife Photography Family
Open guide Tours in Kenya Stays in Kenya
East Africa Midrange

Tanzania

Zanzibar

Zanzibar is ideal when travelers want to slow down after safari and trade game-drive rhythm for beach time, heritage streets, and food-led evenings.

Culture Food Romantic
Open guide Tours in Tanzania Stays in Tanzania
Southern Africa Luxury

South Africa

Kruger National Park

Classic game drives with luxury lodges and strong conservation stories.

Wildlife Romantic Family
Open guide Tours in South Africa Stays in South Africa
Southern Africa Luxury

Botswana

Okavango Delta

Water safaris through pristine channels with mokoro canoe adventures.

Wildlife Slow Travel Photography
Open guide Tours in Botswana Stays in Botswana
East Africa Midrange

Tanzania

Serengeti National Park

Legendary predator sightings and vast plains glowing at sunrise.

Wildlife Adventure Photography
Open guide Tours in Tanzania Stays in Tanzania
North Africa Budget

Morocco

Sahara Dunes

Camel caravans, starlit camps, and cinematic desert landscapes.

Desert Adventure Culture
Open guide Tours in Morocco Stays in Morocco
Southern Africa Midrange

Zimbabwe

Victoria Falls

Thunderous cascades, rainforest trails, and river adventures.

Adventure Family Romantic
Open guide Tours in Zimbabwe Stays in Zimbabwe
Southern Africa Midrange

South Africa

Cape Town

Cape Town is a strong fit for travelers who want a design-forward city break, great food, ocean views, and easy day trips before or after safari.

Culture Food Family
Open guide Tours in South Africa Stays in South Africa
Southern Africa Luxury

Namibia

Namib Desert

Best for travelers who care about scenery, photography, and slower desert pacing rather than high-density wildlife at every stop.

Adventure Photography Slow Travel
Open guide Tours in Namibia Stays in Namibia
Central Africa Luxury

Rwanda

Volcanoes National Park

Gorilla trekking in misty forests with community-led conservation.

Wildlife Adventure Conservation
Open guide Tours in Rwanda Stays in Rwanda
West Africa Budget

Senegal

Sine-Saloum Delta

A softer-paced West Africa destination for travelers who value waterways, birdlife, and community-based stays over a checklist of iconic landmarks.

Culture Slow Travel Community
Open guide Tours in Senegal Stays in Senegal
West Africa Midrange

Ghana

Cape Coast & Kakum

Well suited to travelers who want heritage depth and manageable logistics within a shorter Ghana route.

Culture Community Adventure
Open guide Tours in Ghana Stays in Ghana
North Africa Midrange

Egypt

Cairo & Giza

Perfect for a high-impact heritage trip built around the pyramids, museums, historic neighborhoods, and dense urban sightseeing.

Culture Family Food
Open guide Tours in Egypt Stays in Egypt
North Africa Midrange

Morocco

Marrakech & Atlas Gateway

Best for travelers who want sensory city energy first, then mountain or desert routes without changing the trip entirely.

Culture Food Adventure
Open guide Tours in Morocco Stays in Morocco

Trek Africa Guide

A minimalist but comprehensive Africa travel directory built to help travelers discover where to go, what to do, where to stay, and where to eat before they book with verified partners.
